searchUrl:
<js>
var url = 'https://www.0826j.com/';
var html = java.ajax(url);
var params = {};
var matches = html.match(/var\s+(\w+)\s*=\s*["']([^"']*)["']/g);
if(matches) {
    for(var i = 0; i < matches.length; i++) {
        var m = matches[i].match(/var\s+(\w+)\s*=\s*["']([^"']*)["']/);
        if(m) params[m[1]] = m[2];
    }
}
var body = 'q=' + String(key);
var p = ['vw','abw','ru','jrt','van','fw','cwl','gpr','uyoo','tz','euu','tsn','eju','um','fp','dvm','jpk','deblkx','ht','azy','sna','wqx','fpp','rup','jwj','bgt','qp','yf','cw','wq','sign'];
for(var i = 0; i < p.length; i++) {
    if(params[p[i]]) body += '&' + p[i] + '=' + params[p[i]];
}
var option = {
    'method': 'POST',
    'body': String(body),
    'headers': {'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'}
};
'https://www.0826j.com/api/search,' + JSON.stringify(option);
</js>
